title: Primaries to watch: Zohran Mamdani's endorsements 'will be tested'
shortDescription: The Kennedy family is on the ballot as multiple states head for June 23 primary elections.

title: Legal immigration drops under Trump: What that means for US economy
shortDescription: New data on legal immigration during the second Trump administration's first year shows far fewer petitions being approved, with an oversized backlog.

title: Can Mamdani upset establishment Democrats again in June 23 primary?
shortDescription: Three candidates are challenging mainstream Democrats for NYC congressional seats in the 2026 midterm elections, with the mayor's backing.

title: 'Cut it very violently.' Trump says vandals damaged Reflecting Pool
shortDescription: Trump blamed the peeling paint and algae at the recently renovated Reflecting Pool on vandalism, saying five people have been charged so far.

title: Trump addresses depression fears over Iran
shortDescription: Trump says preventing a nuclear Iran matters more than depression fears.

title: Trump says Reflecting Pool cut 'very violently'
shortDescription: Trump says the Reflecting Pool was slashed with a knife, causing damage that may require draining water and repairs.

title: Bettina Trump gives glimpse into wedding to Donald Trump Jr.
shortDescription: While the couple legally married in Florida on May 21, they also exchanged vows at a "tiny chapel" on a "tiny island" with their families on May 22.

title: Judge blocks Trump voter database over privacy, accuracy fears
shortDescription: A federal judge blocked a Trump administration plan to create a voter database after finding it used inaccurate data.

title: $1 million raised for Ossoff in Georgia Senate race against Collins
shortDescription: Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff raised $1 million on the first day of his general election campaign against Mike Collins for a Georgia Senate seat.

title: Trump speaks out against DC Mayoral race frontrunner, Lewis George
shortDescription: President Donald Trump spoke out against frontrunner and D.C. Council member Janeese Lewis George ahead of Tuesday's primary.

title: DC mayor candidate Janeese Lewis George’s views on Trump, explained
shortDescription: DC mayoral candidate Janeese Lewis George has pushed back on Donald Trump’s criticism and said where she’s willing to work with his administration.
